context: The Weeknd's breakout into the mainstream was the defining Canadian music story of 2015, with 'Can't Feel My Face' becoming his first top-10 year-end entry. Drake also had multiple entries in the full chart. Canada placed 21 songs in the year-end top 100, reflecting a growing Canadian presence in global pop.

tracks.title: Lean On
tracks.artist: Major Lazer & DJ Snake feat. MØ
